holdings.infoBox: BBHL is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.99%, Microsoft at 7.29%, KLA Corporation at 6.53%, Amazon.com at 5.65%, and Apple at 5.49%.

overview.description: The BBH Select Large Cap ETF (BBHL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks long-term capital growth by actively managing a narrow portfolio of large-cap companies worldwide. Security selection is based on fundamental business analysis. BBHL was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by BBH.
